name: HRY_EVENT_FETCH_RUNS
description: Event Fetch details data for whom the archive job to be submitted.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_FETCH_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Event Fetch Run ID. Primary Key of the table.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: LATEST_RUN
columns.Comments: This indicates if a event enabled person is picked up in the Latest Run or not.

columns.Name: PARAM_PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Id Value for Archive Write job submission.

columns.Name: PARAM_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PARAM_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PARAM_PROCESS_CONFIG_GROUP
columns.Comments: Process Configuration Group Value for Archive Write job submission.

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Can be any ID value. FLOW_INSTANCE_ID for Archive Write job.

columns.Name: EVENT_FETCH_TIME
columns.Comments: Event Fetch Time for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: JOB_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start Time of the ESS Job submitted.

columns.Name: JOB_END_TIME
columns.Comments: End Time of the ESS Job submitted.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Describes the status of the Job.

columns.Name: STATUS_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Detailed Message of the Status.

columns.Name: EVENTS_FETCH_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of the rows processed in a particular run.

columns.Name: PURGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date to be Purged for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
